schema.name: read_file
schema.description: Reads a text file under the NDX virtual root, optionally returning a line range. Prefer project-relative paths like apps/... for project files; never write them as /apps/....

path.description: Path relative to the project root, or a container absolute path under the NDX virtual root. Prefer relative project paths.

offset.description: Zero-based line offset to start reading from.

limit.description: Maximum number of lines to return.
